name: implement-verify
description: For quick tasks, prototypes, or non-code tasks. Linear implement→verify with no review cycle. Minimal overhead.

steps.name: Implement
steps.what: Execute {{objective}}. Produce the deliverables listed in mission.md. Follow project conventions.
tools: Read → read existing code for context
Write → create new files if needed

existence: No syntax/parse errors in output files

steps.failure_handling: Fix errors and retry. If blocked by external dependency, log and skip.

steps.name: Verify
steps.what: Spawn harness-eval-agent for independent validation. Check deliverables exist, are non-trivial, and meet mission done definition.
steps.failure_handling: If eval fails, feed details to agent for retry. Circuit breaker at 3 consecutive failures.

eval_standards.name: Deliverable Check
eval_standards.check: All deliverables from mission.md exist with correct structure
eval_standards.method: For each deliverable in mission.md Output Definition, verify file/path exists and is non-trivial.
eval_standards.pass_condition: Every listed deliverable exists, is non-empty, and matches expected format.
eval_standards.on_fail: Return to Implement step to create missing deliverables

eval_standards.name: Functional Correctness
eval_standards.pass_condition: Exit code 0 or all manual checks pass.
eval_standards.on_fail: Return to Implement step to fix issues
